data.title: 国际服山海经歌单「Mina & Rumi’s Day Off」
data.summary: [Shanhaijing Playlist | 'Mina & Rumi’s Day Off' Released] Sensei! To celebrate Radiant Moon, Raucous
data.body:
[Shanhaijing Playlist | 'Mina & Rumi’s Day Off' Released]

Sensei!
To celebrate Radiant Moon, Raucous Dream, Shanhaijing Playlist has been released! 
Let’s take a break and enjoy a relaxing day off with Mina and Rumi~! 🎵

▶Playlist :[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XScPkFfQH-o](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XScPkFfQH-o)
